---
title: "Longitudinal Data Analysis: Mixed Models, GEE, and Missing Data"
subtitle: "BIO-003 | Track A — Biostatistics"
description: "Repeated measures and correlated data arise in virtually every clinical study. This textbook covers the two major frameworks — subject-specific (mixed models) and population-averaged (GEE) — along with the critical problem of missing data."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Longitudinal Data Analysis: Mixed Models, GEE, and Missing Data

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
